subject: grammar
title: Adverbs of Attitude
instruction: Underline the correct word or phrase in the sentences below to indicate the speaker's attitude or source of information.

questions.text: 1. I'm very worried about the plans to build a new shopping centre here. ___ my friend they want to knock down some of the houses.
2. ___, I believe that we will live longer in the future.
3. Joshua is working this weekend so ___ he will have some time off at a later date.
4. We cannot say for sure but ___ an advertising campaign would encourage people to recycle their waste more.
5. ___, we can see that the experiments done by the early scientists have had a great effect on our lives today.
6. We should ___ all reflect on the way we live our lives and try to be more environmentally aware.
7. ___, John agreed to come when I invited him - I hadn't expected that!
8. ___ the number of students leaving university without completing their degrees is rising.
